11.reason: [The condition for digits is incorrect: it uses (s[i-1]<='0' && s[i-1]>='9'), which is always false because '0' < '9'; it should be (s[i-1]>='0' && s[i-1]<='9'). Same error for s[i+1].]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition for digits is incorrect: it uses (s[i-1]<='0' && s[i-1]>='9'), which is always false because '0' < '9'; it should be (s[i-1]>='0' && s[i-1]<='9'). Same error for s[i+1].]
